claims.quote: The Academic Visitor Program coordinates observerships at Hospital for Special Surgery for physicians, students, and allied health care professionals.
claims.claimText: HSS Academic Visitor Program coordinates observerships for physicians, students, and allied health care professionals.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Page describes observerships open to physicians and students — pre-residency USCE access.

claims.quote: Observerships are informal, non-accredited visits, designed for individuals wishing to observe surgical and clinical care at HSS.
claims.claimText: Observerships are informal, non-accredited visits to observe surgical and clinical care at HSS.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Defines the observership as non-accredited clinical/surgical observation — Tier 1 USCE.

claims.quote: Observerships range from one day to two months and are largely structured according to the desires of the visitor and hosting physician.
claims.claimText: Observerships range from one day to two months, structured by visitor and host.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Explicit duration range for the observership program.

claims.quote: The Academic Visitor Program coordinates observerships at HSS for clinicians, students and allied healthcare professionals. It is open to all persons inside or outside of the United States who:
claims.claimText: Open to all persons inside or outside of the United States — international eligibility.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Eligibility explicitly extends to persons outside the United States — IMG-relevant Tier 1 signal.

claims.quote: Are 18 years of age or older.
claims.claimText: Applicants must be 18 years of age or older.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Age eligibility criterion for the observership.

claims.quote: Can provide proof of current COVID-19 and influenza vaccination, including medical documents outlined in the health guidelines.
claims.claimText: Must provide proof of current COVID-19 and influenza vaccination.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Immunization requirement is a Tier 1 USCE eligibility detail.

claims.quote: Who have found a confirmed HSS host and have a serious interest in musculoskeletal health.
claims.claimText: Applicants must have a confirmed HSS host and serious interest in musculoskeletal health.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Host-confirmation precondition is a core observership eligibility criterion.

claims.quote: Due to a growing number of requests, applications are only accepted from individuals with a confirmed HSS host. To apply to the Academic Visitor Program, first secure a host. Have your host complete, sign, and return the host form to the Education Institute. When we receive your approved host form, an application will be emailed to you.
claims.claimText: Applicants must first secure a confirmed HSS host who returns a host form; application is then emailed.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Stepwise application route via host form submission to Education Institute.

claims.visibilityRationale: source family CAREERS_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.quote: At HSS, we will never stand in the way of fresh and innovative thinking. So when you join us as a nurse anesthetist (CRNA)—an advanced practice nurse (APN)—your ideas and enthusiasm will ensure our medical and nursing practice, and our organization, is constantly growing and improving.
claims.claimText: HSS careers page recruiting Nurse Anesthetists (CRNAs) as advanced practice nurses.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Recruitment page for CRNA staff positions — post-training advanced practice career hiring, not a physician USCE pathway.
claims.limitations: CRNA role, not physician; captured as allied/advanced-practice careers signal.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family CAREERS_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.quote: Additionally, through the Center for Advanced Practice Nursing, CRNAs receive a generous continuing education benefit to support conference registration & travel, along with funding for renewal of professional licensure, board certification, CPR certification, and membership to a professional organization.
claims.claimText: CRNAs receive CE benefit covering conferences, licensure renewal, board certification, CPR, professional org membership.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Employee benefits language for CRNA hires — Tier 3 post-training career benefits.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family CAREERS_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.quote: When you join HSS as a nurse anesthetist, you’ll receive new employee orientation to the hospital, clinical & logistics orientation, an orientation specifically designed for advanced practice, and EHR (Epic) training for prescribers. You’ll be partnered with an experienced mentor in your service, invested in your success, and receive six to eight weeks of specialty training in your role.
claims.claimText: New CRNA hires get 6–8 weeks specialty training, mentor pairing, AP-specific and Epic orientation.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Onboarding details for hired CRNAs — post-training employment information.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family CAREERS_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.quote: When you join us as a nurse practitioner (NP)—an advanced practice nurse (APN)—your ideas and enthusiasm will ensure our medical and nursing practice, and our organization, is constantly growing and improving.
claims.claimText: HSS recruits nurse practitioners (advanced practice nurses) as part of its careers/advanced practice and allied health hiring.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Page is an HSS careers page recruiting nurse practitioners (post-trainee practicing APP role), not a USCE or training-program page.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family CAREERS_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.quote: At HSS, NPs practice in adult reconstruction & joint replacement, anesthesia (PACU/OSCU/SDU), anticoagulation, cardiology, diabetic care, occupational health, pain management, pediatrics, post-operative care, radiology, wound care, and in private practice (physician/surgeon offices).
claims.claimText: HSS lists NP practice areas across multiple specialties including adult reconstruction, anesthesia, pain management, pediatrics, radiology, and wound care.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Specialty list describes practicing NP roles inside HSS — post-trainee APP practice, Tier 3.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family CAREERS_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.quote: Additionally, through the Center for Advanced Practice Nursing, NPs receive a generous continuing education benefit to support conference registration & travel, along with funding for renewal of professional licensure, board certification, DEA license, CPR certification, and membership to a professional organization.
claims.claimText: HSS provides NPs with continuing education benefit including funding for licensure renewal, board certification, DEA, CPR, and professional membership.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Describes continuing education and credentialing benefits for practicing NPs — Tier 3 practice/benefits content.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family CAREERS_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.quote: When you join HSS as a nurse practitioner, you’ll receive new employee orientation to the hospital, clinical & logistics orientation, an orientation specifically designed for advanced practice, and EHR (Epic) training for prescribers.
claims.claimText: HSS provides new NP hires with hospital onboarding, advanced practice orientation, and Epic EHR training for prescribers.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Onboarding details for hired NPs — Tier 3 post-trainee practice content.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family CAREERS_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.quote: When you join HSS as a physician assistant, you’ll receive six to eight weeks of training specifically tailored to your role. You’ll also be paired with an experienced mentor who is invested in your success.
